data.en: Would you like to go to the soccer game?
data.cn: 你想去看足球比赛吗？
data.hint: Would you like to do sth.

data.en: Do you want to watch the boxing match?
data.cn: 你想看拳击比赛吗？
data.hint: Do you want to do sth.

data.en: How about watching badminton this afternoon?
data.cn: 今天下午看羽毛球比赛怎么样？
data.hint: How about doing sth.

data.en: Why not run an exciting marathon?
data.cn: 为什么不来跑一场令人兴奋的马拉松呢？
data.hint: Why not do sth.

data.en: Did you hear that there's an e-sports event this weekend?
data.cn: 你听说这周末有一个电子竞技项目活动吗？
data.hint: hear that 宾语从句

data.en: Would you like to come along?
data.cn: 你愿意一起来吗？
data.hint: come along 跟着来

data.en: Really? I'd love to!
data.cn: 真的吗？我很乐意！
data.hint: would love to 省略结构

data.en: Why don't you join us this Saturday afternoon?
data.cn: 你为什么不这周六下午加入我们呢？
data.hint: Why don't you do sth.

data.en: Oh, sorry. I can't.
data.cn: 噢，对不起。我不能去。
data.hint: 情态动词否定回答

data.en: I have to meet my badminton coach for training.
data.cn: 我不得不见我的羽毛球教练进行培训。
data.hint: have to 不得不

data.en: As a player, Lang Ping brought honour and glory to her country.
data.cn: 作为一名球员，郎平为她的国家带来了荣誉和光荣。
data.hint: As 作为；带来荣誉

data.en: Losing two important players was a big challenge, but Lang Ping did not lose heart.
data.cn: 失去两名重要球员是一个巨大的挑战，但郎平并没有丧失信心。
data.hint: 动名词短语作主语；lose heart 泄气
data.title: Legendary Athletes

data.en: She knew that her young players could win if they worked together as a team.
data.cn: 她知道如果年轻球员们作为一个团队共同努力，他们就能赢。
data.hint: 宾语从句与条件状语从句

data.en: Lang Ping led her volleyball team to Olympic gold in Brazil.
data.cn: 郎平率领她的排球队在巴西夺得奥运金牌。
data.hint: led... to... 带领...到...

data.en: When Michael Jordan's feet left the ground, time seemed to stand still.
data.cn: 当迈克尔·乔丹的脚离开地面时，时间似乎停止了。
data.hint: seem to do sth. 似乎...；时间停止

data.en: The player who became known as Air Jordan changed basketball with his graceful moves.
data.cn: 这位被称为“飞人乔丹”的球员用他优美的动作改变了篮球运动。
data.hint: 定语从句；graceful 优美的

data.en: Jordan says that the secret to his success is learning from his failures.
data.cn: 乔丹说他成功的秘诀是从失败中学习。
data.hint: 宾语从句；动名词作表语

data.en: I can accept failure, but I can't accept not trying.
data.cn: 我可以接受失败，但我不能接受不努力。
data.hint: 动名词的否定形式作宾语
accept: I can accept failure; everyone fails at something. But I can't accept not trying.

data.en: Losing games taught him to practise harder and never give up.
data.cn: 输掉比赛教会了他更努力地训练，永不放弃。
data.hint: 动名词作主语；give up 放弃

data.en: In life, Jordan has learnt to share his success with others.
data.cn: 在生活中，乔丹学会了与他人分享他的成功。
data.hint: learn to do sth. 学会做某事

data.en: Every four years, the Games offer audiences a chance to get to know more about winter sports.
data.cn: 每四年，奥运会都给观众一个了解更多冬季运动的机会。
data.hint: Every four years 每四年；offer sb sth

data.en: One of the most popular sports of the Winter Olympic Games is skiing.
data.cn: 冬季奥运会最受欢迎的运动项目之一是滑雪。
data.hint: One of + 最高级 + 复数名词

data.en: Skiing was originally a sport played only in cold northern countries.
data.cn: 滑雪最初是一项只在寒冷的北方国家进行的运动。
data.hint: 过去分词短语作后置定语

data.en: Skaters compete with each other in speed races or in figure-skating events.
data.cn: 滑冰运动员在速滑比赛或花样滑冰项目中相互竞争。
data.hint: compete in 在某方面竞争

data.en: The figure-skaters are generally considered to be the stars of the Winter Olympic Games.
data.cn: 花样滑冰运动员通常被认为是冬季奥运会的明星。
data.hint: be considered to be 被认为是...

data.en: In the skeleton, a person lies on his or her stomach on the sled.
data.cn: 在俯式冰橇项目中，一个人趴在雪橇上。
data.hint: lies on his stomach 趴着

data.en: The skeleton is a lot more exciting and dangerous than that.
data.cn: 钢架雪车比那要刺激和危险得多。
data.hint: a lot + 比较级 表示程度

data.en: The tournament started in 1877 and many of the rules are the same today.
data.cn: 这项赛事始于1877年，如今许多规则依然相同。
data.hint: many of 许多...

data.en: Wimbledon is a treat for all tennis fans.
data.cn: 温布尔登对所有网球爱好者来说都是一种享受。
data.hint: a treat for... 对...来说是一种享受

data.en: Where else can you enjoy champagne and strawberries as you cheer for the champion?
data.cn: 还有哪里能让你在为冠军欢呼的同时，享用香槟和草莓呢？
data.hint: as 引导时间状语从句

data.en: Try to stay positive and active.
data.cn: 尽量保持积极和活跃。
data.hint: stay + 形容词 保持某种状态

data.en: A balanced diet is essential for fitness.
data.cn: 均衡的饮食对健康至关重要。
data.hint: be essential for 对...至关重要

data.en: Exercising every day will make a difference.
data.cn: 每天运动会产生影响。
data.hint: make a difference 起作用

data.en: You should cut junk food out of your diet.
data.cn: 你应该从饮食中减掉垃圾食品。
data.hint: cut... out of... 从...中戒除

data.en: We go to the gym now and then.
data.cn: 我们偶尔去健身房。
data.hint: now and then 偶尔，有时

data.en: If you compare this gym with that one, you'll see the difference.
data.cn: 如果你把这家健身房和那家比较，你就会看出区别。
data.hint: compare... with... 与...相比

data.en: Do you jog often?
data.cn: 你经常慢跑吗？
data.hint: 助动词引导的一般疑问句

data.en: What do you think sports and exercise can do for you?
data.cn: 你认为运动和锻炼能为你做些什么？
data.hint: 宾语从句的特殊疑问形式

data.en: Come and work out at a gym!
data.cn: 来健身房锻炼吧！
data.hint: work out 锻炼

data.en: He does fifty push-ups every morning.
data.cn: 他每天早上做五十个俯卧撑。
data.hint: push-up 俯卧撑

data.en: Wonderful gym, isn't it?
data.cn: 极好的健身房，不是吗？
data.hint: 反意疑问句结构 (前正后误)

data.en: This isn't your first time here, is it?
data.cn: 这不是你第一次来这里，是吗？
data.hint: 反意疑问句结构 (前误后正)

data.en: You come here often, don't you?
data.cn: 你经常来这里，不是吗？
data.hint: 反意疑问句对行为动词的提问

data.en: You've lost some weight, haven't you?
data.cn: 你体重减轻了一些，不是吗？
data.hint: 反意疑问句对现在完成时的提问

data.en: It won't make me too tired, will it?
data.cn: 它不会让我太累，是吗？
data.hint: 反意疑问句对一般将来时否定的提问

data.en: Oh, I don't have to come here every day, do I?
data.cn: 哦，我不用每天都来这里，是吗？
data.hint: don't have to 的反意疑问句

data.en: It's up to you, isn't it?
data.cn: 这取决于你，不是吗？
data.hint: be up to sb 由某人决定

data.en: Those aren't real sports, are they?
data.cn: 那些不是真正的运动，是吗？
data.hint: 代词 those 对应的反意疑问句主语 they

data.en: Tom, you can have one more burger, can't you?
data.cn: 汤姆，你可以再吃一个汉堡，不是吗？
data.hint: 情态动词 can 的反意疑问句
accept: Mum, I can have one more burger, can't I?

data.en: It isn't a storm coming, is it?
data.cn: 暴风雨不会要来了吧，是吗？
data.hint: 否定陈述后的肯定反意疑问句
